hooks.command: echo '[hooks] MCP Playwright test detected - reloading servers...' && pkill -f 'python -m backend.main' 2>/dev/null || true && pkill -f 'vite' 2>/dev/null || true && sleep 1 && (cd /home/adrian/Documents/git/llm-council && uv run python -m backend.main > /dev/null 2>&1 &) && (cd /home/adrian/Documents/git/llm-council/frontend && npm run dev > /dev/null 2>&1 &) && echo '[hooks] Servers restarted'

echo '[hooks] Session ending - reloading servers for next session...' && pkill -f 'python -m backend.main' 2>/dev/null || true && pkill -f 'vite' 2>/dev/null || true && sleep 1 && (cd /home/adrian/Documents/git/llm-council && uv run python -m backend.main > /dev/null 2>&1 &) && (cd /home/adrian/Documents/git/llm-council/frontend && npm run dev > /dev/null 2>&1 &) && echo '[hooks] Servers ready for next session'
